dict.source: The Kakano theme uses a base color for each vault, and generates different shades and gradients from it. You can either select from one of the preset colors, or specify an exact color.
dict.target: Kakano 主题为每个库使用基础颜色，并由此生成不同的色调和渐变。您可以从预设颜色中选择，也可以指定精确颜色。

dict.source: If you just want a quick color, choose one of these.
dict.target: 如果您只需要快速选择颜色，请从这些选项中选择。

dict.source: Set an exact base color. Make sure "Preset base color" is empty, and click Save to apply.
dict.target: 设置精确的基础颜色。请确保“预设基础颜色”为空，然后点击保存以应用。

dict.source: In light mode, note backgrounds can be full white (default) or near white with a slight tint of the base color.
dict.target: 浅色模式下，笔记背景可以是纯白（默认）或带有基础色微调的近白色。

dict.source: In dark mode, note backgrounds can be near black (default) or full black. Near black is a bit easier on the eyes. Full black will save a little energy on OLED screens which will switch back pixels completely off. And some people just like the way it looks.
dict.target: 深色模式下，笔记背景可以是近黑（默认）或纯黑。近黑对眼睛更友好。纯黑可以在 OLED 屏幕上节省一点能量，像素会完全关闭。有些人只是喜欢这种外观。

dict.source: Full black (OLED screen will switch pixels off)
dict.target: 纯黑（OLED 屏幕像素关闭）
区分不可编辑的标签页

dict.source: Most tabs have content created by you (e.g. notes, canvases, kanban charts) but some aren't directly editable (e.g. graphs, calendars, maps). When this setting is on, the non-editable tabs are shaded differently when inactive.
dict.target: 大多数标签页包含您创建的内容（如笔记、画布、看板），但有些无法直接编辑（如图表、日历、地图）。开启此设置后，不可编辑的标签页在非活动状态下会显示不同的阴影。

dict.source: EXPERIMENTAL If there are more tabs than fit in a single row, allow them to wrap to multiple rows.
dict.target: 实验性功能。如果标签页数量超过一行，允许它们换行到多行。

dict.source: Place properties before or after your main note content. Note that this only applies to Live Preview mode.
dict.target: 将属性放在主笔记内容之前或之后。请注意，这仅适用于实时预览模式。

dict.source: When a note is embedded in another note, show or hide the source note's title.
dict.target: 当笔记嵌入到另一篇笔记中时，显示或隐藏源笔记的标题。

dict.source: EXPERIMENTAL Embedded links can be placed at the below your content (so you scroll to the bottom to see them), or pinned so they stay visible as you scroll.
dict.target: 实验性：嵌入式链接可以放置在内容下方（因此需要滚动到底部才能看到），或者固定，以便在滚动时保持可见。

dict.source: Place below content (scroll down to view)
dict.target: 放置在内容下方（向下滚动查看）
固定（滚动内容时保持可见）

dict.source: Show different bullets for different levels of nesting
dict.target: 为不同的嵌套层级显示不同的项目符号

dict.source: Font used for headings. Leave empty to use the same font as body text, as defined by `Text font` in `Appearance`.
dict.target: 标题字体。留空则使用正文字体（由“外观”中的“文本字体”定义）。
标题缩放系数 - 桌面/平板

dict.source: Scale factor for heading sizes. Larger numbers will increase the difference between different heading sizes, smaller numbers will decrease the difference.
dict.target: 标题大小缩放系数。数值越大，各级标题差异越大；数值越小，差异越小。
标题缩放比例 – 手机

dict.source: Scale factor for heading sizes on smaller phone screens. With space at a premium, you'll usually want this to be smaller than the desktop scale factor
dict.target: 小屏幕手机上的标题缩放比例。由于空间有限，通常希望此值小于桌面端的缩放比例。

dict.source: "Maximum line length in characters. 50-75 characters is often recommended for readability in languages with Latin scripts. 15-35 characters may be better for Chinese, Japanese and Korean characters.
dict.target: 最大行长（字符数）。对于拉丁语系，50-75 个字符通常有利于可读性。对于中文、日文和韩文，15-35 个字符可能更好。

dict.source: Line length for Live Preview and Source Mode
dict.target: 实时预览和源码模式的行长

dict.source: These settings apply to the **Live Preview** and **Source** modes, but not to the **Reading** mode.
dict.target: 这些设置适用于 **实时预览** 和 **源码** 模式，但不适用于 **阅读** 模式。

dict.source: Show a background color behind the active line while editing.
dict.target: 编辑时在当前行下方显示背景色。

dict.source: Show line numbers in code blocks
Images can also be centered individually e.g. `![[image_file_name.jpg|center]]`
dict.target: 图片也可以单独居中，例如 `![[image_file_name.jpg|center]]`。

dict.source: Allow wide tables to extend left and right beyond the margins for body text.
dict.target: 允许宽表格超出正文边距向左右延伸。

dict.source: Degree of contrast for background gradients. Set to zero for a flat background color.
dict.target: 背景渐变的对比度。设为零可获得纯色背景。

dict.source: Use a custom gradient for the background
dict.target: 使用自定义渐变作为背景

dict.source: Kakano normally provides a smooth gradient background using the same hue as the base color. This setting overrides that so you can have a gradient with different hues top and bottom. Note that the colors you set here won't be used directly: they'll be lightened for light mode and darkened for dark mode.
dict.target: Kakano 默认提供使用与基础色相同色相的平滑渐变背景。此设置将覆盖默认行为，使您可以在顶部和底部使用不同色相的渐变。请注意，此处设置的颜色不会直接使用：它们在浅色模式下会变亮，在深色模式下会变暗。

dict.source: Base color for the top of the gradient
Base color for the bottom of the gradient

EXPERIMENTAL If you have many items in your status bar, you may find that it overflows onto the sidebars. This setting will push the main app workspace up so the status bar can use the full window width.
dict.target: 实验性：如果状态栏项目过多导致溢出到侧边栏，此设置会将主工作区向上推，使状态栏占据全屏宽度。

dict.source: Obsidian normally shows icons beside settings groups. If you find that distracting, this setting allows you to hide them.
dict.target: Obsidian 通常会在设置组旁边显示图标。如果您觉得这很分散注意力，此设置允许您隐藏它们。
在非原生菜单中启用图标

dict.source: Obsidian normally shows icons for menu items. This setting does not apply if Native Menus are enabled.
dict.target: Obsidian 通常会为菜单项显示图标。如果启用了原生菜单，此设置不适用。

dict.source: Width of space to the left and right of the note content. Set to zero if you'd like the note to extend to the full width, 0.5 or 1 if you'd like to see your background gradient.
dict.target: 笔记内容左右两侧的间距。若希望笔记占满全宽，请设为 0；若希望显示背景渐变，请设为 0.5 或 1。

dict.source: EXPERIMENTAL Scale the main workspace down when there's a modal in the foreground, creating a 3D cards effect. Currently unfinished, but you can see it when you open a prompt.
dict.target: 实验性：当模态框处于前台时缩小主工作区，产生 3D 卡片效果。目前尚未完成，但在打开提示框时可见。

dict.source: Kakano provides styles for some common alternative checkbox states. Different themes have built-in support for different sets of alternative checkboxes, so some users may prefer to use their own CSS snippets that work across multiple themes. If you'd like to do this, you can disable Kakano's built-in alternative checkboxes to ensure that they don't clas with the snippet.
dict.target: Kakano 为一些常见的替代复选框状态提供了样式。不同主题内置了对不同复选框的支持，因此部分用户可能更喜欢使用能在多个主题中通用的 CSS 代码片段。如果需要这样做，可以禁用 Kakano 的内置替代复选框，以确保它们不会与代码片段冲突。

dict.source: Enable image adjustment with alt text
dict.target: 启用带替代文本的图片调整

dict.source: With this setting enabled, Kakano recognises keywords in alt text to position images left/right/center and round corners. None of these are crucial functionality, so if you need to use alt text for its real purpose of accessibility, you can disable this setting.
dict.target: 启用此设置后，Kakano 会识别 alt 文本中的关键词来调整图片位置（左/右/居中）并设置圆角。这些都不是核心功能，因此如果您需要使用 alt 文本进行无障碍访问，可以禁用此设置。

dict.source: By default, Kakano changes the appearance of many community plugins to provide a more consistent appearance. If you prefer the standard appearance for a plugin you can disable Kakano's changes.
dict.target: 默认情况下，Kakano 会更改许多社区插件的样式，以提供更一致的外观。如果您更喜欢某个插件的默认样式，可以禁用 Kakano 的更改。
